_description: 애니메이션 장르 음성 스타일 - 기존 64 페르소나에 추가

cognitive_gap.label: 인지 부조화 (권위+귀여움)
cognitive_gap.description: 귀여운 캐릭터에서 낮고 권위 있는 목소리. 시각-청각 갭이 스크롤 스톱 트리거

male.directorNote: Deep, authoritative, calm confidence. Like a wise mentor speaking through a cute character. The contrast between visual and voice creates intrigue. NOT robotic — warm but commanding. Measured pace with deliberate pauses for impact.

scene_overrides.hook: [Tone: 충격적으로, 첫 단어를 강하게, 짧은 침묵 후 시작]

female.directorNote: Low-pitched for female, authoritative yet warm. Like a confident professor who happens to look adorable. Measured pace, deliberate pauses. Each sentence lands with weight.

provocateur.label: 도발자 (팩폭+귀여움)
provocateur.description: 귀여운 캐릭터에서 빠르고 도발적인 목소리. 이 캐릭터가 왜 이렇게 화났지? 호기심 유발

male.directorNote: Fast, provocative, slightly aggressive. Like a personal trainer trapped in a cute body, calling out your excuses. High energy, punchy delivery. Short sentences hit hard. No mercy on bad health habits.

female.directorNote: Sharp, fast, sassy. Like a no-nonsense coach in a cute costume. Each sentence is a slap of truth. Energetic and unapologetic. Mix of tough love and genuine care.

scene_overrides.agitate: [Tone: 답답하다는 듯, 왜 아직도 이러고 있어?]

gravity.label: 중력감 (CEO+귀여움)
gravity.description: 귀여운 캐릭터에서 극도로 느리고 무거운 목소리. 스티브 잡스 프레젠테이션처럼 한 문장이 울림

male.directorNote: Extremely slow, deep, gravitational. Like a CEO revealing a billion-dollar secret through a mascot. Long pauses between phrases. Every word carries weight. Whisper-to-power dynamic. Start quiet, build to authority.

female.directorNote: Slow, rich, almost hypnotic. Like a narrator of a luxury documentary speaking through a playful character. Deliberate, magnetic, each pause builds anticipation. Velvet voice with steel underneath.
